name: Italian Cheese Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the milk, sugar, and salt in a small saucepan. Heat until lukewarm.
2. Dissolve the yeast in a large bowl with 1/4 cup warm water.
3. When the yeast is bubbly, stir it into the milk mixture.
4. Gradually add about 5 cups of flour to the yeast mixture, and grate in the provolone cheese. Stir until blended well.
5. Add enough of the remaining flour to form a soft dough. Turn onto a floured surface and knead until smooth and elastic.
6. Place the dough in a greased bowl, turning to grease the top. Cover and let rise in a warm place until doubled in bulk (about 1 hour).
7. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Combine melted butter with crushed garlic.
8. Brush the mixture inside two 10-inch round baking pans.
9. Punch down the dough, then divide it into halves, then each half into 7 pieces.
10. Line the rim of one greased pan with 6 pieces and place the remaining piece in the center. Repeat for the second pan.
11. Let rise again until doubled in bulk (about 45 minutes).
12. Brush tops with water and sprinkle with grated Parmesan cheese.
13. Bake in the preheated oven for 45 minutes, or until golden brown.
